title: Another question Why the venom
wikitext:
[]: Another question! Why the venom?? Post by DJLeeZ » Mon Feb 09, 2015 9:41 pm Hey guys I have one More question to ask. I only just signed up so Im a bit behind on the happenings. Why has there been all this venom directed to the rebuild movies after 2.0? Was it really taken so badly by the fans? And what was the main reason for it? I never thought they were going to be clone copies of past evangelions so I have been looking forward to seeing the new additions. But it seems a few ppl are unhappy? I don't want to start any problems I assure you, would just like to catch up on where the community is at atm.

[]: Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Feb 09, 2015 10:26 pm People in general like to complain, about pretty much anything. You'll find the entire spectrum of hate from FUCK YOU ANNO IT'S THE SAME OLD SHIT STOP MILKING IT to FUCK YOU ANNO THIS IS SO DIFFERENT IT'S NO LONGER EVA. In the end it all comes down to people building up their own expectations and demands instead of focusing on what the staff actually wants to show them. There isn't really a single Eva community and within each one the opinions are far from monolithic too.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Feb 09, 2015 10:40 pm What TMB said covers it, pretty much. There is a lot of valid, reasoned criticism of the Rebuild series and some of it overlaps with the reasons for the open hate, but the hate tends to cluster around "Anno changed it, now it sucks" and "Anno is rehashing the same old thing and charging money for it", as well as hatred about character changes, like Asuka Shikinami instead of Asuka Soryu. Since there's nothing much else to discuss in here, I'll be closing this thread. Discussions about why Rebuild is hated tend to become magnets for hatred and anger, unfortunately. EDIT: I forgot about those. Thanks, Tines!

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Tue Feb 10, 2015 2:20 am Linking the most prominent original threads http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/11561/Debate-the-quality-of-Rebuild-here-1/ http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/7773/Debate-the-quality-of-Rebuild-here-2/ DJLeeZ may find some of the answers to the topic question here.
